mapper.select: select s.*,d.user_id as depot_user_id,u.warehouse_name from zhishu_shop_goods s left join t_depot d on s.depot_id = d.id left join sys_user u on d.user_id = u.user_id where s.id = #{id}
select l.* from t_logistics l left join t_depot d on d.template_id = l.id left join zhishu_shop_goods g on d.id = g.depot_id where g.id = #{goodsId}
